## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (or an explanation of why not).
- [ ] Relevant checks pass locally, including `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build` where applicable.
- [ ] Docs/contracts updated in the same change if behavior, coverage, or claims changed.
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability report (those follow SECURITY.md, privately).
